reasons.indemnity: One-sided, uncapped indemnity covering the other party's own negligence.
reasons.limitation_of_liability: Supplier liability fully excluded; customer waives all remedies.
reasons.termination: Unilateral no-notice termination plus long auto-renewal lock-in.
reasons.ip_ownership: Customer's pre-existing IP assigned away to the Supplier.
reasons.payment_terms: Immediate non-refundable payment with unilateral price increases.
reasons.governing_law: Governing law unilaterally chosen by one party at dispute time.
reasons.confidentiality: Confidentiality obligation effectively removed for one party.
